quotes.text: Sometimes the best debugging technique is to go to sleep and realize the answer at 3am while technically unconscious.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Your morning routine doesn't matter if your evening routine is doomscrolling until 2 AM.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The 5 AM club only works if you go to bed at 9 PM. Most people who join it just lose 2 hours of sleep and call it discipline.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best investment in productivity is sleep. Not coffee, not apps, not standing desks. Sleep.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best deep work happens when you're well-rested, not when you're tired. Sleep is productivity.
quotes.author: based
